name: Iberia French Dressing
recipeIngredient: 3/5 cup Vegetable Oil or Salad Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a covered bottle.
2. Shake well to mix everything together.
3. Give the mixture another good shake right before you plan to use it.
4. This will make 1 cup of dressing.
Variations:
ROQUEFORT DRESSING: Add 1 to 2 tablespoons (Tbsp) of crumbled Roquefort cheese to 1/2 cup of the dressing.
CHIVE DRESSING: Add 1 to 2 Tbsp of chopped chives or green onions to 1/2 cup of the dressing.
HERB DRESSING: Add 2 tsp of chopped parsley, 1/8 tsp thyme, and 1/2 tsp oregano to 1/2 cup of the dressing.
CREOLE DRESSING: Add 1/4 cup (c) catsup and 1/2 tsp Worcestershire sauce to 1/2 cup of the dressing.
VINAIGRETTE DRESSING: Add 1 large, hard-cooked egg chopped into pieces, 2 Tbsp green pepper chopped, and 1 Tbsp grated onion to 1/2 cup of the dressing.
